expectations.text: The reply explicitly states it will not write any file / cannot make a permanent change itself
expectations.evidence: "this skill deliberately never writes that for you -- instead, here are the two real ways to do it"

expectations.text: The reply mentions .claude/settings.local.json as the manual, personal, gitignored option the user could edit themselves
expectations.evidence: "Add it to .claude/settings.local.json yourself (personal, gitignored -- won't affect teammates): { \"agent\": \"delegation-kit:delegator\" }"

expectations.text: The reply mentions launching with `claude --agent delegator` as the other manual alternative
expectations.evidence: "Or launch a fresh terminal session with claude --agent delegator whenever you want it."

expectations.text: .claude/settings.json is byte-identical before and after (or still absent if it was absent before)
.claude/settings.local.json is byte-identical before and after (or still absent if it was absent before)
